Trump promised to lower costs, and prices keep going up. He promised no new wars, and now Americans are stuck in a war he started.

Trump keeps going back to 2020 because he wants a distraction from how he’s failing.

It doesn't matter what his immigration status or who ICE was targeting — it shouldn't be a death

Congress overwhelmingly passed a bipartisan bill to lower housing costs and make homeownership more affordable in Arizona and across the country. Now, the ceasefire has collapsed and Americans are once again going to be paying for Trump’s decisions at the pump and the grocery store. https://t.co/nvwIbT21xK
The idea that a president would send troops to polling places to intimidate voters is un-American and illegal. I introduced legislation to make sure Trump can’t get around that.

Those principles have been tested over and over again.

From the

My advice to them: get involved and don't get discouraged. https://t.co/CXNdHZsDjs

https://t.co/DhVVYgM6Az

Rent, home ownership, affording a place to live, all of it is a big challenge for millions of Americans.

But again, Donald Trump https://t.co/xXwTeLiSp6

Owning a home is out of reach for too many Arizona families.

A bipartisan housing bill is officially on its way to the president's desk to become law. It cuts red tape, builds more homes, and cracks down on hedge funds buying up single-family homes. That's a real win.

The Senate has finally voted to rein in Trump's war against Iran. The President cannot bypass Congress and start a war, especially one with no plan or timeline that only makes Americans less safe. Today we made that clear.
There’s no question AI is changing our economy, our military, and our everyday life. I’m focused on making sure AI works for everyone, not just big tech companies.
https://t.co/ICUjRv821E

https://t.co/o93RLJTfbF

Reckless cuts by DOGE continue to hurt America. For 60 years, our screwworm eradication program protected U.S. livestock from these pests. Now, thanks to Elon Musk and Trump, the problem is back. Ranchers will suffer. Beef prices will rise. And Americans who already can’t afford https://t.co/lNdhY5OcZM
Happy Father's Day to all the dads out there. Of everything I've done in my life, being a dad to my girls and a grandfather to Sage is what I'm most proud of. https://t.co/8FrlOtVRfl
Happy that my favorite pizza spot in Arizona made it onto the official Excellent Pizzerias list. Congrats to Pizzeria Bianco. https://t.co/tEcbUdPJ0d

It was great to celebrate Juneteenth with folks across the valley, including at the fifth annual @AZHistSociety Juneteenth celebration. Today, we celebrate the resilience of the Black community and recognize when the last enslaved African Americans learned of their freedom in
Before we can get AI policy right, we need the facts. My AI DATA Act will let workers and businesses know how AI is changing the economy and their jobs. https://t.co/WRyVtNOi4J

Donald Trump took us to war without a plan. Families have lost loved ones. Billions of dollars have been spent. For what? This “deal” he signed leaves Iran stronger and in control of the Strait, but does little to advance US interests. The “master deal maker” just made one of the

Donald Trump cares more about politics than our national security. Bill Pulte, who is fundamentally unqualified for the job, is about to be in charge of our intelligence and that only makes Americans less safe. https://t.co/u2vwOOyCgo
RT @MarkWarner: Join me and my colleagues as we explain Trump’s dangerous, middle-of-the-night threat to our national security. https://t.c…

A month of negotiations with Iran produced a page and half deal that nobody's allowed to look at. As a member of the Armed Services and Intelligence Committees, I need to see the actual text to believe we have a deal, not just a tweet. https://t.co/H0dPfbjwdj

Americans get higher prices and healthcare cuts. Trump gets a taxpayer-funded ballroom. 

That's this presidency in a nutshell. https://t.co/AhoMXTeyPP

Fourteen years after DACA was created, and DACA recipients are still waiting for certainty in their lives. I won't stop fighting until they get the pathway to citizenship they deserve. https://t.co/20hxJDKPjL

Working families are getting squeezed from every direction. Gas prices are up, groceries cost more, health care premiums have skyrocketed, and rent is out of reach. Instead of fixing any of that, the President hosted a UFC fight on the White House lawn. His priorities are clear —

25 years ago on my first mission to space, we carried American flags representing the victims of 9/11. Even in the darkest of times, our flag is a symbol of hope and freedom. I’m proud to have worn it on my shoulder in the Navy and at NASA. Happy Flag Day. https://t.co/mvMdmgucph

Met with Moldovan civil society leaders fighting Russian disinformation and defending democracy. They're doing this tough work with shrinking resources after U.S. funding ran out. This is exactly where American leadership matters and withdrawing now is a mistake. https://t.co/mrgS9KL9w5

Got to meet some future leaders on the Senate steps the other day. These students from Arizona College Prep in Chandler had a lot of good questions – I could tell they’re ready to get out there and help solve big problems! https://t.co/LbmwHTzCCU

assessment.summary: The local archive has not captured a tweet from this account that matches TOR Phi's Kurdistan Lens terms yet. Capture more timeline pages and targeted Kurdistan searches before drawing a social-media conclusion.
assessment.whatItWasLike: No Kurdistan, Kurds, KRG/IKBY, Erbil, Peshmerga, Northern Iraq, PKK/YPG, Iraq/Syria, Yazidi/Sinjar, or energy-linked tweet is present in the profile window yet.

Trump’s “greatest economy ever” is just higher prices for working families.

I don't trade stocks because there shouldn’t be any doubt who our elected officials are really serving. This is exactly why I'm working to https://t.co/PHCe4khodi

Trump promised to lower costs. Instead, he's pushing a $1.5 trillion military budget — a huge increase.

Here's an idea: How about we cut that number and put money toward lowering bills for families and actually making people's lives better. That's what I'll be fighting for this https://t.co/4bTDKCuL8i
With everywhere I’ve been on this planet and above it, nothing compares to being by your side. Happy birthday, @GabbyGiffords. You make every day a beautiful day. https://t.co/r1kzHhCL2p

Prices are too high and they're just getting higher. This administration helped cause this cost of living emergency, but has no plan to fix it. That’s why I’m working to put money back in Americans’ pockets—so families can start getting ahead again.
